verses.text: Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, siangtho munah nasepna dingin amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh limtakin a kigan puan a bawl uh hi. Amaute in Aaron-a' dingin biakna puan siangtho a bawl uh hi
Amaute in siampipuan pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a bawl uh hi
Hoihtakin a kigeel, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte-ah zat dingin kham peek kiseekin khau-in kizen hi
Amaute in siampipuan-a' dingin liangkaih puan bawl uh a, a mong nihte gelah zom uh hi

Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh kibawlin, a nate leh a sepna zia a kibang ahi hi
Israel tapate a phazah tawh kizui-in, onik suangte kitat a, kham tawh a kizepna sungah a minte kigelhin, min gelh siamte' gelh bangin kibawl hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampipuan' liangkaih puan tungah a bulh uh hi
Amaute in kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh, siampipuan a kibawl puan bangin hoihtakin awmdal a bawl uh hi
Tua awmdal a ning kikim a, thuap nihin kibawl a, a kikhep ciangin a dung letmat kua, a vai letmat kua mah a pha hi
Amaute in tua sungah suang gual li bulh uh a, sardis suang, topaz suang, leh karbankal suang gual khat pen a gual masa ahi hi
A gual nihna-ah emerald suang, sapfaia suang, leh diamond suang ahi hi
A gual thumna-ah jakinth suang, agate suang, leh amethyst suang ahi hi
A gual lina-ah beryl suang, onik suang, leh jasper suang ahi hi. Kham tawh zepna sungah tua suangte khempeuh kikoih hi
Israel tapate a phazah tawh kituakin amaute' min a kigelhna suang sawmlenih om hi. Tua min gelhnate pen minam sawmlenih a huamin a kigelh ahi hi
Amaute in awmdal tungah khau tawh a kibang, a kihual kham citak khainiang a bawl uh hi
Kham tawh a kibawl zepna nih leh kham kual nih bawl uh a, awmdal mong nihte-ah kham kual nihte a koih uh hi
Amaute in awmdal mongte-ah a om kual nihte pen kham khau nihte tawh a khih uh hi
Amaute in zepna nihte tungah khau mong nihte zom uh a, tua bangin amaute in siampipuan' liangkaih puan tung a mailamah a bulh uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampipuan tawh a kizom a sunglam nawl, awmdal mong nihte-ah a bulh uh hi
Amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampipuan' liangkaih puan nihte' nuai a mailam, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuante' puankhau a kizopna tung takah a bulh uh hi

Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuan khau tungah a om theihna ding leh siampipuan tung panin awmdal a kol theihlohna dingin amaute in siampipuan' kualte-ah khau dum khatin a kualte tawh awmdal a gak uh hi
Amaute in khau dum bek tawh a kigan siampi puantualpi zong a bawl uh hi
A kikeek lohna dingin puantualpi ngawng pen puan ngawng vang bangin a ngawng kimkotah a zimna om hi
Puantualpi mongte-ah amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh mang kawlsing gahte a bawl uh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in kham citak siklongte zong bawl uh a, puantualpi mong kimkot tunga mang kawlsing gahte' kikalah siklongte a koih uh hi
Biak nasepna dinga puantualpi mong kimkot tungah siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, cih bangin kihelh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in Aaron leh a tapate-a' dingin khau hoih tawh a kigan puantungsilhte
leh khau hoih tawh a kigan dialpi leh khau hoih tawh a kigan lukhute, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl pheituam hoihte
leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl puan kawnggak leh phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul puante zong a bawl uh hi
Amaute in kham citak tawh a siangtho kizepna peek khat bawl uh a, min gelhna a kibawl mah bangin tua tungah thu gelhin, “ Topa' tungah siangtho,” ci uh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in a tunga dialpi tungah a gak dingin tua tungah khau dum khat a vawh uh hi.
Tua bangin kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasep khempeuh kiman hi. Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh bangin Israel mite in sem khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute man khin uh hi
Amaute in biakbuk, a puanbuk leh a nazat khempeuh, a vankhainate, khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite leh a bullente
a kisansak tuutal vunte leh savun dangte tawh a kibawl khuhna leh kong puankhai dalna puan
thuciamna singkuang, a zawlte leh hehpihna tokhom tawh
sabuai leh a nazat khempeuhte leh Ompihna Anlum
kham citak meivakkhuam leh meivak a kibulhsa tawh a meivakte leh a nazatte khempeuh leh meivak-a ding sathau
kham biakna tau, nilh sathau leh a namtui paknamtui leh puanbuk kongkhak-a ding kongpuankhai
sumngo biakna tau leh a sumngo siklen, a zawlte leh a nazat khempeuh; kisilna kuang leh a ngakna
buktuala puan kikhaite, a khuampite, a bullente leh buktual kongpi-a ding kongpuankhai, a khaute leh a khetphimte; leh kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasepna-ah a nazat khempeuh
siampi nasepna dingin siangtho muna zat ding hoihtakin a kibawl puante, siampi Aaron-a' ding biakna puan siangthote leh ama tapate' puante, Moses kiangah a paipih uh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin Israel mite in nasep khempeuh hih uh hi
Moses in nasep khempeuh vel a, amaute in Topa' thupiaksa bangin a bawl khitna a mu hi. Tua ciangin Moses in amaute thupha a pia hi.
